# Focus on T structure region (rows 40-50)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
t_region_nodes = []
for n in nodes:

    if boundary:
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        max_row = max(p[0] for p in boundary)
        if 40 <= min_row <= 50:
            t_region_nodes.append(n)

print(f"Nodes in T region: {len(t_region_nodes)}")
for n in t_region_nodes:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
